Changed_Other.purpose: Ensures players are using the latest version of the game by tracking updates.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Updates how dynamic strings with timestamps are handled in the game.
Changed_Other.purpose: Ensures accurate time displays, improving user experience in time-sensitive scenarios.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Uses a fast string representation of the Git hash for version control.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves performance and reliability in tracking game updates.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlipTimeStampFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Optimizes how time-related strings are formatted and displayed.
